s: Control Shelly smart home devices on your local network. No cloud, no account.
d:
Pearlnode lets you control Shelly smart home devices directly over your local Wi-Fi network. No cloud account, no internet connection, no data leaving your home.

FEATURES

- Auto-discovery via mDNS, IP range scan, and BLE (for devices in setup mode)
- Manual add by IP address
- Supports Gen1, Gen2, Gen3, and Gen4 Shelly devices
- Per-channel on/off control with live status polling
- Power monitoring (real-time wattage for Plug S, Plug M, and other metering devices)
- RGBW color picker and brightness control
- Dimmer brightness slider
- Relay pulse for door and gate openers
- Schedules: create, edit, enable/disable, and delete device schedules with day-of-week repeat
- Alarm Sync: automatically create device schedules relative to your phone alarm (configurable offset and action)
- Firmware updates: check, download, and upload firmware directly to the device
- Home screen widgets: multi-device toggle widget and single-device widget
- Credentials encrypted on-device with AES-256-GCM via Android Keystore

SUPPORTED DEVICES

Gen1: Shelly 1, 1L, 1PM, 2, 2.5, 4Pro, UNI, i3, Plug, Plug S, Plug US, Dimmer, Dimmer 2, Duo, Vintage, Bulb, RGBW2, EM, 3EM, H&T, Flood, Door/Window 2, Motion

Gen2/Gen3/Gen4: Plus 1, 1 Mini, 1PM, 1PM Mini, 2PM, 4PM, Plus Plug S/M, Plus Dimmer, Dimmer 10V, Wall Dimmer, Plus RGBW PM, Plus i4, Plus H&T, Plus Flood, EM Mini, Pro 1, 1PM, 2, 2PM, 3, 4PM, Pro EM, Pro 3EM, Pro Dimmer, Pro RGBW PM, Wall Display, and Gen3/Gen4 equivalents.

PRIVACY

All communication stays on your local network. The only external connection is an optional firmware update check to updates.shelly.cloud. No analytics, no tracking, no accounts.
